rows.label: tlk70000049_02_msg001
rows.name:
Prince Adel. I am sure you do not
need to be told this, but I implore
you nonetheless to be careful.

rows.label: tlk70000049_02_msg002
rows.name:
Your compassion is wonderful,
but you sometimes choose
the fire on purpose...

rows.label: tlk70000049_02_msg003
rows.name:
While helping others is
admirable, prudence is
also an important virtue.

rows.label: tlk70000049_02_msg004
rows.name:
Though I know you do not like to
hear it, your life carries more
weight than that of the average man.

rows.label: tlk70000049_02_msg005
rows.name:
You are the King's only son. It would
be tragic if anything happened to you.
Please just keep that in mind.
